plugins.name: hive-mind
plugins.description: A plugin built for agent interactions with the hive-mind knowledge system.

plugins.name: sf-utils
plugins.description: Base skills and rules for working in Salesforce DX projects.

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Local transcription + skill-driven meeting notes. Records audio via the scribe CLI, then processes the artifact into a hive-mind vault note with speaker attribution, calendar attendees, and vault context.
